steps.title: Turn the facts into points
steps.content: A linear profit function is determined by two points. The profit is $330$ when $x=6$ and $780$ when $x=12$, so use $(6,330)$ and $(12,780)$.

steps.title: Find the line from the data
steps.content: Use the two points directly. From $(6,330)$ to $(12,780)$, the slope is $$m=\frac{780-330}{12-6}=75.$$ Substitute $(6,330)$ into $y=75x+b$: $$330=75(6)+b$$ $$b=-120$$ So $f(x)=75x-120$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: D is correct. It checks both points: $75(6)-120=330$ and $75(12)-120=780$. The other choices fail at least one of those two point checks.
